ogTitle: Kyle Bay vs Kynnumboon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kyle Bay and Kynnumboon.
heading: Kyle Bay vs Kynnumboon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kyle Bay, New South Wales and Kynnumboon, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kynnumboon has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kyle Bay (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kyle Bay or Kynnumboon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kyle Bay has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Kynnumboon scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kyle Bay scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Kynnumboon scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kyle Bay or Kynnumboon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kynnumboon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
